nodes.label: .`search caches a successful result and does not call the provider again`()
.`search re-queries after the cache entry expires past the TTL`()
.`search does not expire a cache entry that is still within the TTL`()
.`search falls back to the second provider when the first finds nothing`()
.`search recovers when a provider throws and tries the next one`()
.`search propagates cancellation instead of trying the next provider`()
.`search returns empty and caches nothing when every provider finds nothing`()
.`search treats queries as case-insensitive and trims whitespace for cache lookups`()
